channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Buffalo Bills agree to sign CB Christian Benford to 4-year, $76 million extension, AP source says
item.description: The Buffalo Bills reached an agreement to sign cornerback Christian Benford to a four-year, $76 million contract extension in their latest offseason move to secure a young core player to a long-term deal, a person familiar with discussions confirmed to The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: John Wawrow, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: GM says firing Grizzlies' coach with 9 games left his decision and in team's best interests
item.description: The general manager of the Memphis Grizzlies says the decision to fire coach Taylor Jenkins with nine games remaining in the regular season with the franchise firmly in the playoff chase was "mine and mine only.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: USC coach Lindsay Gottlieb defends Mississippi State player amid online harassment over JuJu Watkins' injury
item.description: USC head coach Lindsay Gottlieb came to the defense of a Mississippi State player as she faces online bullying over her involvement in the play that resulted in JuJu Watkins' injury.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: No longer sick, Dodgers' Mookie Betts hits a pair of '160-pound homers' as he works to gain weight
item.description: Mookie Betts is no longer ailing, finally able to keep food down and eating up a storm to pack on the weight that he dropped while battling a stomach virus during the first two weeks of the season.
item.dc:creator: Beth Harris, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: CMU men's lacrosse escapes Concorida as Maverick women dominate CSU Pueblo
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Colorado Mesa's Men's Lacrosse team looked in full control on their way to a sixth win when they held a 7-3 second-half lead over RMAC foe Concordia University Irvine. Then came a Golden Eagle onslaught. Three quick goals and CUI was within one.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Betts hits winning 3-run homer in 10th as Dodgers beat Tigers 8-5 for first 4-0 start since 1981
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Mookie Betts hit a game-winning, three-run homer in the 10th inning to lift the Dodgers to an 8-5 win over the Detroit Tigers on Friday night a few hours after Los Angeles received its 2024 World Series rings.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Juan Soto slugs first homer for Mets in win against Astros
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — After slugging his first home run with the New York Mets on Friday night, Juan Soto insisted he isn’t burdened by the lofty expectations to perform after signing his record deal.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Alysa Liu delivers the US its first women's figure skating world championship in nearly 2 decades
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Alysa Liu skated around the ice in disbelief, her golden dress shimmering in the lights of TD Garden, and the appreciative roar from a sellout crowd reminded her why she had returned to the sport following a nearly two-year retirement.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Tennessee is heading back to the Elite Eight as defense clamps down in 78-65 win over Kentucky
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Those two regular-season losses to Kentucky don't mean anything to Tennessee now. The Volunteers avenged them in convincing fashion on the big stage of the NCAA Tournament on Friday night, posting a no-doubt 78-65 victory that sent them to a second consecutive Elite Eight.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Fans chant 'sell the team' at Rays home opener; team owner says talks are nothing new
item.description: The Rays pulled out a win in their new home for the season at Steinbrenner Field, but the ball club's future in Tampa Bay remains uncertain.
item.dc:creator: Marilyn Parker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Gianna Kneepkens enters transfer portal
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Gianna Kneepkens, the leading scorer on the Utah women's basketball team has announced she is entering the transfer portal.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bulls face the Mavericks on 4-game win streak
item.description: Dallas Mavericks (36-38, 10th in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (33-40, ninth in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EDT BOTTOM LINE: Chicago aims to keep its four-game win streak intact when the Bulls take on Dallas. The Bulls are 14-22 in home games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: CF Montreal seeks first win of the season, visits the Chicago Fire
item.description: CF Montreal (0-4-1) vs. Chicago Fire (3-1-1) Chicago; Saturday, 8:30 p.m. EDT BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Chicago -175, Montreal +429, Draw +308; over/under is 2.5 goals BOTTOM LINE: CF Montreal seeks its first victory of the season when it visits the Chicago Fire.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Yankees pay tribute to Miller Gardner, late teen son of former star outfielder
item.description: The New York Yankees paid tribute to 14-year-old Miller Gardner Thursday before their opening day rendezvous with the Milwaukee Brewers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Spanish court overturns soccer player Dani Alves' rape conviction on appeal
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — Brazilian soccer player Dani Alves won his appeal against a sexual assault conviction as a Spanish court overturned the ruling Friday in a case that lasted more than three years and saw the former Barcelona defender spend 14 months in jail.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Gronk-a-Mania set to run wild over WrestleMania weekend
item.description: Rob Gronkowski grew up emulating his sports heroes in school, never shy about unleashing a Stone Cold Stunner or dropping a People’s Elbow on his roughhousing friends.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sox fans shower Derrick Rose with MVP chants during first pitch
item.description: CHICAGO - Coming back to Chicago never gets old for Derrick Rose. The former Bulls MVP returned to the South Side Thursday to throw out the first pitch at the White Sox home opener, where he was showered with MVP chants from the crowd. "It's surreal. It's always surreal.
item.dc:creator: Rick Tarsitano, WGN 9

item.title: Opening Day 2025: White Sox have a winning Opening Day record, featuring some memorable moments
item.description: CHICAGO — Opening Day is finally upon us. It's a day that comes with a sense of hope among baseball fans in early spring, a season that represents new beginnings often exemplified by the warmer temperatures and the blooming of trees and flowers.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9

item.title: This California MLB team has highest median ticket price, new report finds
item.description: A California team has the highest median ticket price, a new report found, but they don't play in Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: Tony Finau out to win second Houston Open
item.description: HOUSTON (ABC4 Sports) - Utah native Tony Finau came into this year after going through two pretty big life events. The first was knee surgery back in December.
item.dc:creator: Wesley Ruff, ABC 4

item.title: Warriors' Stephen Curry won't play in Miami, 2nd straight game missed with pelvic contusion
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Stephen Curry is going to take a little more time to heal. Curry remained out of Golden State's lineup Tuesday night for a game against the Miami Heat, the second straight game he has missed with a pelvic contusion.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: The MLB teams with the highest
item.description: A California team has the highest median ticket price, a new report found, but they don't play in Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, WGN 9

item.title: Stanford football coach Troy Taylor fired after allegations
item.description: (KRON) -- Stanford football head coach Troy Taylor has been fired, team officials announced Tuesday, following a report that he was investigated twice for allegedly mistreating staffers.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: Late boxing legend George Foreman had deep ties to this East Bay city
item.description: (KRON) -- Boxing legend and former heavyweight champion George Foreman died last Friday at the age of 76. Foreman was born in Texas. However, after a troubled upbringing, he then moved to the West Coast after ninth grade when he enrolled in President Lyndon B. Johnson's Job Corps work program.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Padres Opening Day: What's new inside Petco Park
item.description: The baseball season has finally returned and San Diego Padres fans are getting amped to set foot back inside Petco Park. Here's what is new for fans inside the stadium.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Tiger Woods confirms his relationship with Vanessa Trump in a social media post
item.description: Tiger Woods has confirmed his relationship with the former daughter-in-law of President Donald Trump, publishing two images to social media in a post that said, “Love is in the air.” Woods and Vanessa Trump, who was married to Donald Trump Jr.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Mitchell returns to Utah, leads Cavs past Jazz
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Jarrett Allen scored 18 points and Donovan Mitchell added 16, helping Cleveland snap a four-game losing streak with a 120-91 victory over the Utah Jazz on Sunday. Evan Mobley had 11 points, 11 rebounds and three blocks to help the Cavaliers get back in the win column.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: San Diego Wave FC triumphs 3-2 over Utah Royals in home opener
item.description: San Diego Wave FC secured a thrilling 3-2 victory over the Utah Royals in their highly anticipated home opener match at Snapdragon Stadium on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Real Salt Lake shut out by FC Dallas, 1-0
item.description: SANDY, Utah (AP) - Luciano Acosta scored the match's lone goal deep into first-half stoppage time to lift FC Dallas to a 1-0 win over Real Salt Lake on Saturday in a Western Conference match in Sandy, Utah.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: LeBron James' return from injury spoiled by Bulls' phenomenal effort in 146-115 win over Lakers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — LeBron James' return from a seven-game absence was the dominant storyline, to say the least, when the Bulls got ready to face the Lakers in Los Angeles on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: No. 1 seed Houston holds off Gonzaga comeback, beats No. 8 seed Bulldogs 81-76 to reach Sweet 16
item.description: LJ Cryer matched a career high with 30 points, including two free throws with 14.2 seconds left, and No. 1 seed Houston held on to beat eighth-seeded Gonzaga 81-76 on Saturday night to reach the Sweet 16 for the sixth straight NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: McNeese's Will Wade signs a 6-year deal to become NC State coach, AP source says
item.description: McNeese coach Will Wade has a signed six-year deal to take over as N.C. State's next coach, a person with knowledge of the situation told The Associated Press on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, Fox 5
